title: camptosema coriaceum
intro: Camptosema coriaceum, also known as False Palafoxia, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Camptosema coriaceum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions.
